A POS system as
refined as your jewellery

A complete point-of-sale, payments, and customer experience system — designed exclusively for Tiara. Elegant on the counter. Powerful behind the scenes.

See the system Compare pricing
The opportunity

Your single card machine
is holding you back

No records. No insight. No marketing. Every sale that walks out the door is a missed connection. Tiara's pieces deserve a checkout experience as thoughtful as the jewellery itself.

01
No customer records
When someone buys a Tiara piece, there's no record of who they are, what they loved, or when their anniversary falls — so you can never bring them back.
02
No stock visibility
Without inventory tracking you can't see what's selling, what's slow-moving, or what to reorder — leaving revenue tied up in the wrong pieces.
03
No marketing channel
Every customer leaves without a way to reach them. No email list means no new-collection launches, no seasonal campaigns, no anniversary reminders.
04
Overpaying on fees
Legacy card machines often charge 1.75–2.5% with hidden costs. At Tiara's transaction values, the right provider saves thousands of pounds.
The customer experience

From the window to a lasting relationship

Every touchpoint — from the moment someone stops outside to the anniversary reminder a year later — handled automatically by the system.

01
The window stops them
Before a customer steps inside, the 43" entrance display is already working. Tiara's imagery loops silently — jewellery, campaigns, seasonal looks. Visible from the street at night through the glass. No staff effort required.
Entrance display
02
They browse and ask questions
Staff use the Samsung tablet to pull up any piece instantly — metal type, price, stock level, whether it comes in other sizes. No paper catalogues, no guessing. The full Tiara range is always at hand.
Loyverse POS
03
The sale is rung up
Staff tap the item on the POS. The order total appears instantly on the customer-facing iPad mini — branded with the Tiara aesthetic, facing across the counter. Stock is decremented automatically in the background.
POS + customer display
04
Payment taken — any card
The SumUp Air reader sits in its dock, always charged. The customer taps their card, phone, or watch. Contactless, chip & PIN, Apple Pay, Google Pay. Done in seconds. The rate: 0.99% for UK consumer cards.
SumUp Payments Plus
05
Email and opt-in captured
While the payment processes, the iPad mini prompts: "Would you like your receipt by email?" A single tap. A second prompt asks if they'd like to hear about new collections and events. Elegantly framed — not a generic marketing pop-up.
Customer display · Mailchimp
06
They leave — but stay connected
Their email lands in Mailchimp automatically. Their purchase is logged in Loyverse — item, value, date. A customer profile is created. They receive a branded receipt. From this moment, Tiara can reach them with purpose.
CRM · Mailchimp
07
New collections land in their inbox
When Tiara launches a new line, a campaign goes to everyone who opted in — segmented by what they bought, when they bought it, how much they spent. Not a bulk mailout. A conversation with people who already love the brand.
Mailchimp campaigns
08
The anniversary reminder
Eleven months after their purchase, an automated email goes out: "It's nearly a year since you chose this piece. Perhaps someone special deserves something just as beautiful." One email. Sent while Tiara sleeps. Revenue that didn't require a single extra sale effort.
Mailchimp automation
The system

Four components.
One seamless counter.

Everything chosen for elegance, reliability, and value. Refurbished hardware sourced with 12-month warranties — same performance, significantly lower upfront cost.

⬡
Entrance display
43" display · Android stick · Tiara brand reel playing silently · Visible from street at night through the window
▣
Staff POS terminal
Samsung Galaxy Tab S8+ 12.4" · Loyverse POS (free) · Catalogue, stock tracking, customer CRM, sales reports
◈
Customer-facing tablet
iPad mini refurb · Swivel stand · Order confirmation · Email capture · Marketing opt-in · TIARA-branded screen
◉
Card reader + dock
SumUp Air · Charging dock · Always powered · Contactless, chip & PIN, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay
⊕
Backup POS — handheld device
Compact smartphone or tablet · Loyverse POS installed · SumUp solo card reader · Offline-capable · Paired and ready to go the moment the primary terminal needs attention
Loyverse POS — free
Unlimited catalogue items, live stock tracking with low-stock alerts, customer profiles, and detailed sales reports — all at £0/month. Native SumUp integration means payments sync automatically, no manual workarounds.
SumUp Payments Plus
£19/month drops the in-person rate to 0.99% for UK consumer cards. At Tiara's transaction values this pays for itself in the first few sales every month.
Mailchimp email marketing
Free up to 500 contacts. Customer emails captured at checkout feed directly into targeted campaigns — new collections, anniversary reminders, seasonal events.
No contracts, no lock-in
SumUp Payments Plus cancels any time. Loyverse is permanently free. Every element of this system can scale, change, or be replaced without penalty.
Redundancy — backup POS always available
Should the primary terminal ever go offline or need attention, a pre-configured handheld device steps in immediately — Loyverse POS installed, paired to a SumUp solo reader, and ready to process sales without interruption. No lost transaction, no awkward pause with a customer. The show goes on.

Rates verified April 2026: SumUp sumup.com/en-gb/payments-plus · Square squareup.com/gb/en/pricing · Stripe Terminal 1.4%+10p UK/EEA cards · Revolut revolut.com/business/revolut-reader · PayPal POS zettle.com/gb/pricing · Dojo dojo.tech/pricing · myPOS mypos.com/en-gb/pricing-and-fees · Tyl by NatWest tylbynatwest.com/card-machines/pricing-fees · Shopify shopify.com/gb/pricing · Lightspeed lightspeedhq.com/uk (rate estimated). SumUp Payments Plus 0.99% applies to UK consumer Visa/MC only — Amex/corporate/intl revert to 1.69%. Revolut does not accept Amex. myPOS 1.10%+7p applies to domestic/EEA cards under £10k/mo turnover. Dojo requires 12-month contract. Tyl requires NatWest business account. Lightspeed and Shopify monthly fees include POS software.

What you receive

Built for a jewellery
boutique like Tiara

Every feature chosen because it directly serves a high-value, relationship-driven retail business — not a coffee shop or food truck.

I
Product catalogue
Build Tiara's entire range in Loyverse — by collection, metal type, price point. Staff tap to add items instantly, no barcode scanner required.
II
Stock tracking
Every sale automatically updates inventory. Email alerts when any piece falls to low stock so you can reorder before it runs out.
III
Customer profiles
Loyverse auto-creates a customer record from each transaction — name, purchase history, total spend. No manual entry, no extra effort.
IV
Sales intelligence
Daily, weekly and monthly sales reports. See which collections perform best, busiest hours, and revenue trends — all in Loyverse's free dashboard.
V
Email capture at checkout
The customer-facing iPad prompts for a receipt email and marketing opt-in at the moment of purchase — elegantly, without friction.
VI
Targeted campaigns
Mailchimp integration turns your email list into revenue — new Tiara collections, Valentine's Day, anniversary reminders, VIP early access.
VII
Brand presence at the door
The entrance display runs Tiara's imagery silently. Visible through the window at night — setting the tone before a customer even steps inside.
VIII
Every payment accepted
Contactless, chip & PIN, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay. SumUp accepts all major cards including American Express at the same rate.
IX
No contracts, ever
SumUp Payments Plus cancels online any time. Loyverse is free forever. The whole system can scale or change without any penalty.

Getting started

Ready in under a week

Everything is plug-and-play. No technical installation. No engineers. Here is the path from today to your first Tiara sale on the new system.

Sign up to Loyverse POS (free)
Create your account at loyverse.com. Download the app on the Samsung tablet. Build the product catalogue with Tiara's collections — typically 20–30 minutes.
Sign up to SumUp and order the reader
Create your SumUp account, subscribe to Payments Plus (£19/month, cancel anytime), and order the Air reader with charging dock. Arrives within 1–3 days.
Order the hardware
Samsung Tab S8+ and iPad mini from Back Market (both with 12-month warranty). TV, Android stick, and all mounts from Amazon alongside. Everything arrives within 2–4 days.
Set up the Tiara entrance display
Plug the Android stick into the TV HDMI. Upload your brand imagery to Google Drive and display on loop via a free kiosk app. Visible from the street immediately.
Connect and go live
Pair the SumUp reader to the staff tablet via Bluetooth. Connect the customer iPad to shop Wi-Fi. Run a test transaction. You are live.
Start building Tiara's customer list
Connect Mailchimp to Loyverse. Your email database builds automatically from the first sale. Send your first "Welcome to Tiara" campaign to new subscribers.

Project fee

Your investment

What's included
Discovery & scoping — understanding your current setup, catalogue size, and requirements
Hardware procurement — sourcing all devices, placing orders, coordinating delivery
Loyverse POS setup — account creation, product catalogue build, CRM configuration, SumUp integration
SumUp account & reader — subscription activation, Bluetooth pairing, test transaction
Customer-facing iPad kiosk — Chrome kiosk mode, email capture form, brand styling
Entrance display — Android stick setup, Google Drive brand loop, TV positioning
Mailchimp integration — account setup, Loyverse connection, welcome campaign template
Testing, go-live & staff handover — end-to-end testing, walkthrough, handover notes
Project management & communications — scheduling, coordination, email correspondence
Project fee
£700
One-off project fee

The project fee covers full technical setup and configuration of every system component. The following content will need to be provided and managed by the owner: product listings and descriptions entered into the Loyverse catalogue; images, video, and artwork displayed on the entrance TV and POS screen; and the copy and creative for Mailchimp marketing emails and campaigns.
